channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Mbappé critical of tactics in loss by 'sloppy' Fra...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Kylian Mbappé seemed to question Didier Deschamps' approach and tactics after France's 2-0 defeat to Spain in the FIFA World Cup semifinal Tuesday.

item.title: England weighing man-marking plan to stop Messi
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: England coach Thomas Tuchel said he has considered man-marking Lionel Messi in Wednesday's World Cup semifinal against Argentina.

item.title: Scaloni: Argentina 'not as bad' as some people say...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Argentina manager Lionel Scaloni shut down criticism over the way his team has played throughout the FIFA World Cup ahead of the semifinal against England on Wednesday.

item.title: Man United's Ugarte undergoes knee surgery
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manuel Ugarte has undergone surgery after suffering a knee injury at the World Cup, Manchester United have confirmed.

item.title: Spain 'feeling unbeatable' heading into WC final
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Luis de la Fuente said Spain are "feeling unbeatable" after reaching the World Cup final with a 2-0 win over France.

item.title: Matt Freese: USMNT criticism 'hurts my heart'
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese said he felt hurt by the backlash following the elimination from the 2026 World Cup after losing 4-1 to Belgium in the round of 16.

item.title: Lewa on Fire: No Euro club would do after Barça
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: New Chicago Fire signing Robert Lewandowski said he couldn't imagine playing for another European club after his four-season stint with Barcelona, and that explains in part his decision to move to MLS.

item.title: Man United sign Villa's Tielemans in $47M deal
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Manchester United have announced the signing of midfielder Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa.

item.title: 📈 World Cup stock watch: Who has impressed?
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: The FIFA World Cup is into the semifinals, but which players have impressed and which have struggled during both tournaments?

item.title: FG hails NECO CBT exam, says technology curbing malpractice
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description: The Federal Government on Wednesday expressed satisfaction with the conduct of the ongoing National Examinations Council school-based Senior School Certificate Examination. It described the Computer-Based Test format as a major milestone in efforts to eliminate examination malpractice and improve th

item.title: Why England vs. Argentina is World Cup's best, ang...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Wednesday will see England and Argentina meet for the first time since 2005, and it's a rivalry that has defined the World Cup thanks to some unforgettable encounters. Here's why this game is so compelling.

item.title: How Harry Kane became one of England's great capta...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: Listen to Harry Kane's teammates, and they'll describe him as England's greatest player ever. He is one of their best-ever captains, too.

item.title: I spend up to $300,000 monthly in Nigeria- Davido
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigerian music star Davido reveals he spends up to $300,000 monthly on personal expenses in Nigeria, excluding major costs.

item.title: Trump slams ICE decision to suspend traffic stops after two shootings
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Donald Trump criticizes ICE’s decision to suspend traffic stops following two fatal shootings, calling it a blow to crime-fighting efforts.
Read More: https://punchng.com/trump-slams-ice-decision-to-suspend-traffic-stops-after-two-shootings/

item.title: Buying a house is getting easier by one measure. Here’s why it doesn’t feel like it.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Home prices are growing much slower than they did during the pandemic-era buying frenzy.

item.title: Rescue all Nigerians still held by terrorists, Middle Belt Forum urges Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Henry Umoru ABUJA — The Middle Belt Forum (MBF) has urged President Bola Tinubu’s administration to intensify efforts to rescue all citizens still held captive by terrorists, including schoolchildren abducted from Mussa, Lassa, Shikarkir, Ariko, Awon and other affected communities across the coun

item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The Federal Government has commended the conduct of the National Examinations Council (NECO) Computer-Based Test (CBT) Senior School Certificate Examination, saying the new format is helping to curb examination malpractice. Minister of State for Education, Prof. Suwaiba Ahmad, assessed on Wednesday

item.title: Senate Donates ₦50 Million to Families of Deceased Victims of Oriire Abduction
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Nigerian Senate has donated the sum of N50m to the families of victims of the Oriire school abduction, who lost their lives during the incident. This was disclosed during plenary on Wednesday. TVC News Online reports that the school principal, Mrs Rachael Alamu, speaking at the Oyo State Governm

item.title: Spotify expands parent-managed accounts to users on its free tier
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The feature was previously only available to paid subscribers.

item.title: Ireland Extends Travel Relief For Expired Residence Permits Till August 31
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Ireland has introduced a temporary travel concession permitting eligible foreign residents to use recently expired Irish Residence Permit (IRP) cards for international travel until August 31, 2026, as authorities work to address delays in residence permit renewals. The measure, announced by the Mini

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Minister of Works, David Umahi, has expressed confidence that President Bola Tinubu remains firmly positioned ahead of the 2027 presidential election, declaring that the President currently has no credible opposition. Umahi stated that Tinubu’s leadership and ongoing infrastructure projects ac

item.title: European countries that allow assisted dying (euthanasia)
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Belgium followed the Netherlands later in 2002 by adopting euthanasia with similar caveats to the Dutch. The post European countries that allow assisted dying (euthanasia) appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: India bets billions on breaking China’s grip on smartphone manufacturing
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: New Delhi announced a $6.5 billion smartphone manufacturing program and a $13.3 billion semiconductor push to deepen India's electronics supply chain.

item.title: Why Nigerian movies may cost Ghanaian TV stations their licences
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The National Film Authority, NFA, is considering tougher sanctions following allegations that some Ghanaian broadcasters download Nollywood films from YouTube and show them to viewers without authorisation or payment.

England face Argentina at the Mercedes-Benz Stadium in Atlanta for a place in the World Cup final, where Spain awaits after defeating F

item.description: The outbreak has spread to five provinces in the central African country, according to the latest figures released by Congolese health authorities on Wednesday. The post Ebola Outbreak Tops 2,000 Cases In DR Congo appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: PayPal’s battered stock is getting a record boost from a report of buyout interest
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: Shares of PayPal, the struggling payments processor, were having their best day ever on Wednesday, after the release of a report that rival Stripe is teaming up with private-equity group Advent International on a bid.

item.title: BREAKING: Nigeria’s inflation eases to 15.91% in June despite rising food prices
item.dc:creator: Nairametrics
item.description: Nigeria’s headline inflation rate edged lower to 15.91% in June 2026, compared to 15.93% recorded in May, according to the latest Consumer Price Index (CPI) report. The June inflation rate was significantly lower than the 25.29% recorded in June 2025, reflecting a continued moderation in headl

item.description: Governor Uba Sani has broken a 20-year old jinx in Jaba local government, with the commissioning of five township roads in Kwoi, the headquarter of the Area Council. item.title: Nigerian priest dies by suicide after notice to leave US
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: A Nigerian Catholic priest living and serving in Massachusetts, United States Reverend Benjamin Madu has reportedly died by suicide, days after receiving a notice to leave the United States to his home country Nigeria. According to the Catholic Archdiocese of Boston, the 54-year-old priest died on J

item.title: How Christian Yoka restored confidence in Congo’s finances
item.dc:creator: The Africa Report
item.description: The Republic of Congo’s finance minister has begun to put Brazzaville’s debt back on a more sustainable path. Drawing on his years running the Africa department at the French Development Agency, he has persuaded investors to take another look at the country.

item.title: France move from Deschamps to Zidane wondering wha...
item.dc:creator: ESPN Soccer
item.description: France's Didier Deschamps era ended with a shock World Cup semifinal defeat to Spain. Is Zinedine Zidane better placed to get more out of this clearly talented group?

item.title: FCT: Houses for judge’ll be on owner-occupier basis, subject to Tinubu’s approval – Wike
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Minister of the Federal Capital Territory, FCT, Nyesom Wike, on Wednesday, revealed that the newly inaugurated judges quarters would be given to Judges at an owner-occupier basis. Wike, however, noted that the structures would be given to judges following President Bola Tinubu’s approval a

item.title: ‘They cut off online access’: My mother’s bank balance plummeted after her death. What’s going on?
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: “Since her death, her bank balance fell to $9,000 from $16,000.”

item.title: Kano/Jigawa Customs Generates N63.78bn In 6-Month – Controller
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Kano/Jigawa Command of the Nigeria Customs Service (NCS) has, in the first half of the 2026 fiscal year, generated 63,078,655,523.44 billion Naira from January to June 2026. Speaking in a press briefing, the Command Controller, UU Adamu, said the generation of revenue surpassed the 58,389,838,28

item.title: We submitted names of our presidential candidates before INEC deadline – Wike-backed PDP
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Nyesom Wike-led Peoples Democratic Party, PDP, has insisted that it submitted its presidential name before the Independent National Electoral Commission, INEC, issued an official deadline.The faction’s National Publicity Secretary, Jungudo Mohammed, said this in a statement, dismissing the claim

item.title: Arsenal explore Alvarez deal as Atletico Madrid forward eyes summer exit
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: Arsenal are monitoring the situation of Argentina forward Julian Alvarez after he informed Atletico Madrid of his desire to leave the club this summer.. The 26-year-old is understood to prefer a move to Barcelona, but Atletico are unwilling to negotiate with their LaLiga rivals. The Spanish club hav

item.title: Troops rescue five kidnap victims in Zamfara
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigerian troops have rescued five kidnapped victims after overrunning a suspected terrorist camp in Anka Local Government Area of Zamfara State. According to security sources, the operation was carried out by troops of Sector 2, Operation Fansan Yamma, after they received intelligence that armed ter
